chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 61 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.05 & 25 2. For orders on CMA No.1731/2025 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.1732/2025 04.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2022 without any progress. Order sheet demonstrates that since inception the applicant has not made any effort to have the matter listed and / or heard. Even today learned counsel remains unprepared. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
